name: the cloud refresh workflow runs the registry walker on a daily schedule and on manual dispatch so consumers without egress receive current rules from git
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'w = YAML.safe_load(File.read(ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"] + "/.github/workflows/standards-refresh-cloud.yml"), aliases: true); on = w["on"] || w[true]; steps = w["jobs"]["refresh"]["steps"]; runs = steps.map { |s| s["run"].to_s }.join("\n"); ok = on["schedule"][0]["cron"].to_s.strip == "0 6 * * *" && on.key?("workflow_dispatch") && runs.include?("commands/standards-refresh.sh") && runs.include?("--registry"); STDERR.puts "cloud-refresh-scheduled-and-dispatchable" if ok; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)'
